headline: 7 Lessons That 25-Year-Old Corporate Superstar Cole Clark Says Accelerated His Career
summary:
Graduates are often faced with the same problem. In short, regular 9-to-5 jobs may appear as a hindrance to personal growth and fulfillment, says 25-year-old, New York-based executive Cole Clark.

“It breaks my heart when kids, fresh out of college, see 9-to-5 jobs as bad,” he says. “They see it as preventative.”
